prompt: I need to implement ENG-101. Here are the requirements directly (skip jira lookup): Add a /health endpoint to our Python Flask API that returns {"status": "ok", "version": "<from config>"} with HTTP 200. The codebase is in /home/user/dot-claude-playground. Use the jira-multi-agent skill.

assertions.description: A file named implementation_summary.md exists in the outputs directory
The implementation summary references the '/health' route or endpoint that was built

assertions.text: Summary includes a files-changed section or table
assertions.description: The summary lists which files were created or modified, ideally in a table
The summary references test files or test cases that were added

assertions.text: Summary includes acceptance criteria or caveats section
assertions.description: The summary has a section covering acceptance criteria status or known caveats

assertions.text: (with_skill only) Execution trace shows Design phase was run
assertions.description: execution_trace.md references a Design agent or design phase being executed

assertions.text: (with_skill only) Execution trace shows Coding and Testing phases
assertions.description: execution_trace.md shows both Coding and Testing agents/phases were invoked
